basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 40 years of age who possess an MS/MD in Obstetrics & Gynecology or an equivalent postgraduate degree with 1 year of experience in Gynecological Oncology are eligible to apply for this Fellow in Gynecological Oncology vacancy. The online application process for TMC Fellow in Gynecological Oncology Recruitment 2026 has started on 30 May 2026 and will remain open until 15 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation: Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC & 10 years for Physically Handicapped. Age and Experience as on 31-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MS/MD (Obstetrics & Gynecology) OR equivalent PG degree with 01 year experience in Gynecological Oncology
qualification.details: MS/MD (Obstetrics & Gynecology) OR equivalent PG degree with 01 year experience in Gynecological Oncology

salary_details.details: Rs. 133623 - 145530 Per Month Rs.1,33,623/- p.m. (Gross Pay) 1st Year; Rs.1,36,269/- p.m. (Gross Pay) 2nd Year (MS/MD/DNB); Rs.1,45,530/- p.m. (Gross Pay) 1st & 2nd Year (MCh/DM/DNB)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Fellow in Gynecological Oncology recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Fellow in Gynecological Oncology position at Tata Memorial Centre is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for this fellowship?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MS/MD in Obstetrics & Gynecology or an equivalent postgraduate degree, along with at least one year of experience in Gynecological Oncology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 40 years. Age relaxations are provided for SC/ST, OBC, and Physically Handicapped candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Fellow in Gynecological Oncology post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Fellow in Gynecological Oncology position in this recruitment drive by Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 300/-. Payment is to be made online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this fellowship?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a MCQ Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Fellow in Gynecological Oncology position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 1,33,623/- to Rs. 1,45,530/- per month, depending on the qualification and year of fellowship.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Tata Memorial Centre located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the Tata Memorial Centre located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the position of Fellow in Gynecological Oncology is a contractual role at the Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q10. When will the fellowship commence?
faq.answer: The fellowship is scheduled to commence on 01 August 2026.
